title: Implement enhanced logging in process_next_event method
description: Modify python/src/lichen/sim/simulation.py process_next_event() method to add debug logging that includes: sim_id, event_type, event_time_us, queue_size, and nodes_blocked information when debug is enabled.
close_reason: Enhanced process_next_event logging with sim_id/event_type/queue_size/nodes_blocked using new helper. All sim debug complete.
